_comment: Committed connection config — env-var placeholders ONLY, never real credentials (tracked file). The elementor connection starts when WP_URL / WP_USERNAME / WP_APP_PASSWORD are set — the same vars wordpress-api-pro uses, so one env set targets the same site with both toolkits. On devices set them in the shell; in claude.ai cloud environments set them in the environment's env vars (one environment per client site works well). Unset, the server is skipped silently. The npx proxy bridges stdio to the site's /wp-json/mcp/elementor-mcp-server endpoint; per-site local setups keep using files/setup-elementor-mcp.sh, which writes a gitignored per-project config.
